violations.text: The establishment does not employ a full-time, on-site manager certified in food safety Licensed with RIDOH. FMC has expired and must re-instate, application provided. New Violation. Correct By: 04/16/2026

The chlorine sanitizer concentration for the sanitizing cycle of the bar dishwasher was 0 parts per million (ppm). Chlorine sanitizing solutions must be between 50-100 ppm. New Violation. Correct By: 04/16/2026

Juice was observed held at 64 degrees Fahrenheit in the bar low boy, with an ambient temperature of 64. Time/temperature control for safety (TCS) food must be held at 41 degrees Fahrenheit or below except during preparation, cooking, or cooling. Juice was disposed; all other items did not require refrigeration. Temperature was adjusted on unit during inspection. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 04/02/2026
Cases of beverages were observed stored on the floor in the walk-in. Food must be stored at least 6 inches above the floor. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 04/02/2026
The facility is lacking test strips to measure the concentration of the quaternary ammonium sanitizing solution for the 3-bay sink. New Violation. Correct By: 04/16/2026

The non-food contact surfaces of the following have an accumulation of dust, dirt, food residue, and other debris: -ice machine -stand mixers -under prep unit hoods. New Violation. Correct By: 04/16/2026
The walk-in was observed with a hole in the wall, closed with a rag. New Violation. Correct By: 04/16/2026
